title: Meta Reinforcement Learning

blocks.title: Compare and Contrast

panels.label: What it is
panels.body: A framework for reinforcement learning that involves learning to learn It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques.

panels.label: What it is not
panels.body: It is not just Reinforcement Learning Algorithms (e.g., Q-Learning, SARSA, DQN) and Q-Learning; the graph shows how it sits inside Reinforcement Learning.

panels.label: Common confusion
panels.body: Ask whether the term changes policy, reward, exploration, or control dynamics. Compare it against Reinforcement Learning Algorithms (e.g., Q-Learning, SARSA, DQN) and Q-Learning so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.

panels.label: Best next step
panels.body: Review Q-Learning and Reinforcement Learning Algorithms first, then move toward Deep Reinforcement Meta-Learning and Cognitive Meta-Reinforcement Learning.
